name: Apricot Filled Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except the filling to make a soft dough.
2. Roll out the dough 1/8 inch thick and cut out 48 round cookies.
3. Place 1 teaspoon of filling on the top of 24 rounds.
4. Cover each with another round, crimp edges, and make a slit on top.
5. Bake for 10-12 minutes in a preheated oven at 375°F.
6. Makes 24 cookies.
